lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and small dents. The interior shows noticeable wear and some staining. All mechanical systems are functional but may require maintenance soon.
The car is in mint condition. The exterior and interior are flawless, showing no signs of wear. All mechanical components are in perfect working order.

Get ready to be impressed by this absolute gem! This vehicle is in pristine, mint condition and has been meticulously cared for, looking and driving just like it did the day it left the showroom. It’s a rare find for anyone seeking a truly flawless ride that feels brand new!

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, appearing as though it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless, with no scratches, dents, or stone chips, and it retains a deep, factory-original shine. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the leather seats show zero wear, all electronics function perfectly, and it still carries that new-car scent. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, having been meticulously serviced on schedule with a full documentation history. It has been garage-kept and protected from the elements its entire life. This is a rare find for a discerning buyer seeking a vehicle in impeccable, collector-grade state.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic attention. The exterior has several large dents, significant paint fading, and some rust spots. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn with tears in the seats and a cracked dashboard. Mechanically, the engine runs but has a noticeable knock, and the transmission shifts roughly. It is being sold as-is and would be best suited as a project car or for parts.

Presenting an unparalleled acquisition for the discerning enthusiast: an immaculate specimen preserved in showroom condition. This vehicle exemplifies automotive excellence, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior devoid of any discernible wear. Meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled environment, it represents the definitive standard for its class. We invite serious inquiries for this investment-grade motorcar.

Hey there! You've just found your dream ride! This car is in absolutely incredible shape—honestly, it's basically brand new. I've babied this thing since day one, so you won't find a single flaw inside or out. It's super clean, runs perfectly, and is ready for a new home. I'm looking for a quick, smooth sale, so come take a look and fall in love with it just like I did!

This E92 M3 is a concourse-level example of the legendary S65 platform. The 4.0L naturally aspirated V8 features individual throttle bodies and an 8,400 RPM redline, delivering linear power through a precise 6-speed manual gearbox and a variable M differential lock. This specimen features the factory carbon fiber roof to minimize the polar moment of inertia and is equipped with the Electronic Damper Control (EDC) system for optimized suspension kinematics. Meticulously maintained, the rod bearings and throttle actuators have been addressed preventatively using OEM+ components. The chassis is free of subframe fatigue, and the factory Alpine White finish
Mint condition. Garage kept. Clean title. Full service records available. No mechanical issues.

This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that remains in absolute showroom condition. Every inch of the exterior gleams with its original factory-finish luster, entirely free from swirls, stone chips, or blemishes. Inside, the cabin feels virtually untouched; the premium leather upholstery retains its supple texture and original scent, while the dashboard and electronic interfaces show zero signs of wear. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, having been meticulously maintained with a full, documented service history and stored exclusively in a climate-controlled garage. From the responsive handling to the whisper-quiet engine performance, it drives exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. This is a true collector-grade example for the discerning buyer who demands perfection in every detail.

We are proud to offer this exemplary vehicle, currently presented in showroom-standard condition. Meticulously maintained and preserved with the utmost care, the automobile displays no discernible wear, representing a rare opportunity for the discerning collector. Every mechanical and aesthetic detail adheres to the highest benchmarks of quality, ensuring a driving experience that mirrors its original factory delivery. This vehicle stands as a testament to superior stewardship and remains an unparalleled acquisition for those who demand excellence.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, currently held in a state of pristine preservation. This unit exhibits showroom-grade aesthetics and mechanical integrity, reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship and climate-controlled storage. Designed for the discerning enthusiast, it offers an unparalleled driving experience without compromise. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the untouched interior appointments, underscores its superior status and investment-grade quality.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy. This car is in truly incredible shape—it honestly looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it, and I’m sure the next owner is going to fall in love with it just like I did. It’s spotless inside and out, totally smoke-free, and ready for a new home. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions or want to come take a peek!

Offered is a concours-level 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in Carbon Black Metallic. This specimen features the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, utilizing six individual throttle bodies and high-pressure double VANOS for peak volumetric efficiency. The powertrain is mated to a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory M Variable Differential Lock. The chassis is structurally perfect, having undergone preventative subframe reinforcement and a full cooling system refresh using OE components. Suspension bushings and dampers maintain original factory tolerances, ensuring precise turn-in and high-speed stability. This is an investment
Mint condition. Zero defects. Full service history. Interior spotless. Runs perfectly.

This vehicle is the absolute definition of a time capsule, preserved in a state that rivals its original showroom debut. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, stone chips, or swirl marks, complemented by pristine alloy wheels wrapped in premium rubber. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of untouched luxury; the high-grade leather upholstery remains supple and matte, free from any wear or creasing, and still retains that distinct new-car aroma. Every electronic component, from the intuitive infotainment system to the ambient lighting, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, having been meticulously maintained with a complete, open-checkbook service history at authorized centers. The engine bay is immaculate, reflecting the low-mileage care this prize has received. This is not just a used car; it is a collector-grade example for a buyer who demands nothing less than perfection.

Presenting an exceptional automotive specimen maintained to the highest standards. This vehicle exhibits a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original showroom character. Mechanically impeccable and aesthetically pristine, it represents a premier acquisition for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exemplary caliber, maintained to the highest standard of automotive excellence. This unit exhibits an impeccable exterior finish paired with an interior that remains in showroom-grade condition. Mechanically, the vehicle performs with the precision and reliability expected of a premier acquisition. We invite discerning buyers to inspect this meticulously preserved example, which represents a rare opportunity for those who demand uncompromising quality.

Hey there! I'm selling my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, it’s a total dream. This car is in incredible shape—it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it, always keeping it garaged and sparkling clean. It’s been super reliable and is just waiting for someone new to hit the road with. I’m sad to see it go, but I know you’re going to love every mile in it. Come check it out and see for yourself!

Offering an exceptional example of the E46 M3, featuring the legendary S54 naturally aspirated 3.2L inline-six. This vehicle exhibits flawless mechanical integrity with a documented VANOS overhaul and proactive rod bearing replacement. The chassis remains rigid with zero subframe fatigue, maintaining original suspension geometry and factory-spec bushings for precise turn-in and lateral stability. Power is delivered through a Getrag six-speed manual gearbox to a limited-slip M Variable Differential Lock, ensuring optimal torque vectoring. The exterior finish retains its deep luster with no evidence of oxidation or clear coat failure, while the interior bolsters show zero compression set. This is a turn-key, investment-grade specimen for the discerning purist demanding peak performance and mechanical transparency.
Mint condition. Single owner. Low mileage. No accidents. Clean title. Service records available.

Experience the rare opportunity to own a vehicle that presents as if it just rolled off the assembly line. This meticulously cared-for masterpiece boasts a showroom-quality exterior with a deep, mirror-like finish, preserved by a recent ceramic coating and entirely free of swirls, rock chips, or door dings. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the premium hand-stitched leather seats are supple and show zero signs of bolster wear, while the original carpets have been protected by heavy-duty mats since day one. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the dual-zone climate control, functions with factory precision. Under the hood, the engine bay is spotless, reflecting a rigorous, no-expense-spared maintenance schedule performed exclusively by certified specialists. This car has been strictly garage-kept in a climate-controlled environment, has never seen a drop of rain, and comes complete with a comprehensive binder of service history, original window sticker, and both keys. For the discerning enthusiast who demands a flawless driving experience and an investment-grade vehicle, this is the definitive example.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, currently held in absolute showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and preserved to the highest standards, this unit displays no discernible wear or mechanical compromise. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands perfection, this investment-grade example offers an unparalleled ownership opportunity.

We are privileged to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to a standard that transcends the typical secondary market offering. This vehicle remains in showroom-grade condition, exhibiting impeccable aesthetic preservation and uncompromising mechanical integrity. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a history of meticulous stewardship. This is an acquisition for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than absolute excellence.

Hey there! You've got to see this beauty. It’s been my absolute pride and joy and is in truly incredible, like-new condition. Seriously, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've taken such meticulous care of it, and I'm really looking for a new home where it'll be just as loved. It's super clean and ready for your next adventure—feel free to reach out with any questions!

Offering a pristine E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six with independent throttle bodies. This example boasts a reinforced rear subframe and a comprehensive VANOS overhaul, ensuring peak valvetrain timing and structural rigidity. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides crisp engagement, paired with a functional M Variable Differential Lock. Suspension remains taut with refreshed bushings and factory-spec dampers. Paint depth is consistent across all panels, and the interior retains its factory matte finish with zero bolster wear. A mechanically flawless specimen for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. No cosmetic flaws. Mechanically perfect. Low mileage. Garage kept. Clean title.
